name: Stick Crunch
image_match: Crunches — a stick crunch is a standard crunch with a dowel slid up the thighs to standardize range of motion. yuhonas has no 'stick crunch'; Crunches (HTTP 200) is the direct movement match.
form_cues: Slide the stick up the thighs to guide range
Crunch from the abs; don't pull on the neck
notes: Phase 1 PT core move — stick slides up thighs for form feedback.
instructions: Lie on your back with knees bent, holding a light stick or dowel resting across the thighs.
Crunch up, sliding the stick up toward the knees as the shoulder blades leave the floor.
Pause at the top, then lower under control.
